title: Better Sand
description: This texture pack redesigns the sand textures.
body:
### **BetterSand – v26.2 Release**

**BetterSand** enhances the visual quality of **sand**, **red sand**, and **all related block textures** with **cleaner patterns**, improved **shading**, and more **natural color transitions**. Designed to stay faithful to **vanilla** while offering a noticeable **upgrade**, this pack refreshes **beaches**, **deserts**, and **sandstone builds** without altering gameplay. Fully compatible with all Minecraft versions **1.20 and above**, BetterSand works seamlessly in **survival**, **creative**, **modded**, and with **shaders**. A lightweight visual improvement for players who want their worlds to feel warmer, smoother, and more immersive.
